description: A1 fast-slow metric closure: the projected gradient flow on the triangle penalty converges to the sub-multiplicative regime; this stabilizes a quasi-metric tube on which the slow physics evolves.
verdict_canonical: lambda_triangle = 1.04 >= 1.0 and epsilon = 0.07 <= 0.10; A1 fast-slow flow stabilizes a quasi-metric tube on P1.
verdict_P0: lambda_triangle = 0.93 close to threshold; small-N reference activation reading.
verdict_extended: Drift regime; no A1 fast-slow stabilization.
